name: Junior Beginner Fun Tournament
description: A welcoming introduction to tournament play for young juniors. Emphasis on fun, learning, and good sportsmanship.

name: Junior Spring Championships
description: A USTA-sanctioned junior tournament featuring singles and doubles draws across multiple age divisions. Excellent match play experience for competitive juniors.

name: Junior Advanced Championships
description: Competitive junior tournament for advanced young players ready for serious match play and ranking points.

name: Adult Weekend Open
description: A friendly but competitive adult tournament with singles and doubles brackets. Perfect for league players looking for tournament experience.

name: Junior Elite Showcase
description: Top junior talent competing in a high-level showcase event with coaches and scouts in attendance.

name: Teen Starter Tournament
description: A friendly tournament designed for teenagers new to competitive tennis. Build confidence and meet other players.

name: Elite Invitational
description: An invitation-only tournament for top-ranked juniors and adult elite players. High-stakes matches with college scouts in attendance.

name: Teen Intermediate Cup
description: Mid-level teen competition with balanced draws and plenty of match play for developing players.

name: Senior Classic
description: A tournament celebrating experienced players. Singles and doubles draws for senior players with modified formats for enjoyment and competitiveness.

name: Adult Intermediate Open
description: A popular tournament for recreational adult players seeking competitive but friendly match play.

name: Senior Social Slam
description: A fun and social tournament for senior beginners. Focus on enjoyment, fitness, and making new friends.

name: Teen Challenge Cup
description: A tournament designed for teenage players developing their competitive game. Round-robin format guarantees multiple matches for every participant.

name: Adult Elite Masters
description: The highest level adult competition at Ace Reserve. Attracts top local players and seasoned competitors.

name: Adult Advanced Open
description: For experienced adult players seeking strong competition. UTR-compatible event with competitive draws.

name: Senior Advanced Classic
description: Competitive senior tournament for experienced players. Doubles-focused with mixed draws.

name: Senior Elite Invitational
description: Invitation-only senior elite event featuring the club's most competitive mature players.
